form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 4th of 7 at this track on April 2 over 1000m, 5 len behind Kaalvoet with 54.5kg at $8. Before that 4th of 8 at this track on February 10 over 1000m, 3 len behind His Lordship with 60kg at $9. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning won by 2.5 len Turffontein Inside July 17 over 1450m defeating Winds Of Grace carrying 56kg at $1.50. On debut fifth of 10 at this track May 29 over 1000m, 3 len behind Constellation carrying 52.5kg at $41. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after 10 months 7th of 11 at Turffontein Standside on March 7 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cape Saffron carrying 59kg at $26. Previously second-up won by a neck at Greyville May 3 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Dark Matter with 60kg at $9. Should progress from that first-up run.
